text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! 🎉 You've been approved as a moderator. Thank you for volunteering to help keep our space safe and welcoming. A senior mod will reach out soon with next steps.
Welcome to the community, guide_sam! 🎉 You've been approved as an event helper. We appreciate your enthusiasm for organizing community events! Check #event-planning to get started.
Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! 🎉 You've been approved as a member. We're glad to have you here! Feel free to introduce yourself in #introductions and explore the channels.
Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! 🎉 You've been approved as a mentor. Your experience will be invaluable in helping new members grow. Check #mentor-lounge for coordination.
